name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_reference_handoff

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_acceptance_gate

note: Lab acceptance dependency.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeErrorBudget supplies preset surface and clearance aggregate readiness and error diagnostics.
note: Aggregate diagnostic dependency.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_result_seed

note: Rotor-level validation seed source.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target

note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.
